modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be poor spelling and grammar and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Trouble downloading Panopto Recorder on PC or Mac

full_description_text:  
I’m trying to get the Panopto Recorder on my computer. I don’t know how to download or install it. Is it different for PC and Mac? I just need some help with this.

description: I’m trying to get the Panopto Recorder on my computer. I don’t know how to download or install it. Is it different for PC and Mac? I just need some help with this.
